updates.tweet_text: @repetak I can't control CPI. I give the setups, people can take them or not take them based on their risk tolerance. I gave targets and triggers and they hit

updates.tweet_text: @repetak That's data days though! Only alternative would be not to post before data. Everyone knows that CPI reactions are random, large, and instant

updates.tweet_text:
Little to do now in #ES_F but levels are respecting perfectly. Today's plan was simple: 7567-73 was next up posted at 8am. It hit. Then recover sees 7585, 7597, 7611. We hit 7611, topped out.

Now backtesting 7567-73 which has become support. No change to levels or targets https://t.co/CHarJmmT5W
updates.notes: All prices mentioned (7567-73, 7585, 7597, 7611) are morning-plan levels; tweet is a hindsight recap with no new actionable levels named.

updates.tweet_text:
Back to boring summer chop in #ES_F and all the action was in the 2 mins after CPI. Levels held nicely since though. Post CPI targets were 7567-73, 7585, 7597, 7611, all hit.

7567-73 then became support to buy the backtest. Held. Same upside targets, ride runner from here https://t.co/yaq24jdBBy
updates.notes: All mentioned prices (7567-73, 7585, 7597, 7611) are morning plan levels or hindsight hit references; 7567-73 support is reaffirmation/observation, not a new actionable level.

updates.tweet_text: @chrisAn00930062 I didn't take at it at 830, it was simply too fast after CPI. Normally I'd position before CPI but we just had no volatility and the zone was too choppy. I need momentum and strength to enter, which we had after CPI but we ran the whole target set instantly. I just took the 67-73

updates.tweet_text:
There's 7597 hit again and we are running the target set for the second time today. Today's targets were 7585 (hit many times), 7587 (hit 2x), then 7611 (hit once).

7573-67 tests/recoveries were entry and we backtested it. After 7611 7621, 7629, 7639 are bonus targets https://t.co/cNQzcSgOrH

updates.tweet_text:
Now we're just into ride runners for the rest of the day/summer trading protocol in #ES_F. Do not touch this action. Today's targets off 7573-67 zone were 7585 (hit), 7597 (hit), 7611 (hit).

7621, 7629, and 7639 are next targets up when this range finally clears to the upside https://t.co/lw4LrSsMrJ

updates.tweet_text: Closing update #ES_F: Another slow day of summer trading and its easy as long as you are not overtrading chop. Trade the vol expansions, then get out, 7597, 7611, 7629, then 7639 are next when we breakout. Newsletter out soon with new supports and next dip buy later on
updates.notes: 7629 is newly named as a breakout target sequence level not in morning plan; 7597, 7611, 7639 are already-published levels and excluded.
